displayText.headline: A Legacy of Trust, Generation After Generation
displayText.offer: THE ULTIMATE STANDARD IN MULTISPECIALITY CARE
displayText.subheading: For decades, Max Healthcare has evolved alongside families across India, constantly upgrading our infrastructure to protect your future.
displayText.footer: Serving millions of families with uncompromising commitment.

style: Staggered frame overlays, modern clinical editorial, clean grid intersections.
description: A clean collage of three overlapping images: a historic foundation shot of Max Saket, a high-tech modern MRI console screen, and a close-up of a doctor placing a reassuring hand on an elderly patient's shoulder.
